title: Waiver / Exception
description: A documented, time-bounded exception to a platform control. A waiver is an explicit risk acceptance, not a silence. All waivers have an expiry date, a named approver, and appear in every assessment report covering the waived control. Lives in 09-assessments/waivers/.

$schema.description: Schema reference for editor tooling. Not validated against the schema itself.

resource_ref.description: The specific resource this waiver covers.

type.description: Type of resource the waiver applies to.

identifier.description: Repository URL, service name, or environment identifier.

rationale.description: Why the control cannot currently be satisfied. Must be specific and honest.

risk_acceptance_statement.description: Explicit statement of the risk accepted by granting this waiver. Not a restatement of the rationale.

compensating_controls.description: Control IDs of controls that partially mitigate the gap. Does not replace the waived control.

approved_by.description: Identity of the approver. P1 controls require platform-owner level.

expiry_date.description: Required. No open-ended waivers. An expired waiver is treated as non-existent.

review_date.description: Optional intermediate review date before expiry.

status.description: active: in effect. expired: expiry_date passed. revoked: manually cancelled before expiry.
